scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-built.mjs && pnpm exec tsx scripts/free-dev-port.ts && pnpm exec tsx scripts/setup-binaries.ts --check && concurrently -n packages,renderer,electron -c yellow,cyan,magenta "pnpm exec tsc -b packages/agent-runtime --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "pnpm --filter @desktop-agent/renderer dev" "pnpm exec tsx scripts/wait-and-start-electron.ts"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @desktop-agent/renderer build && pnpm --filter @desktop-agent/electron build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/shared packages/open-agent-sdk packages/agent-runtime apps/renderer apps/electron && pnpm --filter desktop-agent-evals-coding typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm dep-check && pnpm knip && pnpm test
